assurance_levels.label: Baseline evidence
assurance_levels.summary: Basic publication and discoverability of claims; minimal evidence artifacts.

assurance_levels.label: Operationally testable
assurance_levels.summary: Testable protocol behavior with integrity and freshness expectations; evidence is reproducible.

assurance_levels.label: Independently assessable
assurance_levels.summary: Independent assessment posture, stronger lifecycle discipline, and evidence bundles suitable for external review.

assurance_levels.label: High assurance / mission critical
assurance_levels.summary: Strong governance, adversarial resilience, and audit-ready evidence with rollback/immutability expectations.
